case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MYISHA MCNAIRY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MCNAIRY, MYISHA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MCNAIRY, MYISHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAY-16-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MCNAIRY, MYISHA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MCNAIRY, MYISHA
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCNAIRY, MYISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 744 MISSOURI STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, *** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE. *** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
